arts.ttl: Athletic Club quietly confident of Europa League one with final prize on offer
arts.sum: Athletic Club fans will not want to get ahead of themselves, but so far things are going to plan in Europe for the Basque side. They could have had a Champions League place this year were it not for the unforgettable season Girona had, but it does allow them to dream of reaching the 2025 […] The post Athletic Club quietly confident of Europa League one with final prize on offer appeared first on Football España.
